name: @ggui-samples/agent-claude-sdk
description: Reference sample: a Claude Agent SDK app that hosts the ggui MCP server, with a React chat UI built on @ggui-ai/react's <McpAppIframe>. Boots an HTTP server (port 6790) that serves the chat shell + an SSE-streamed /chat endpoint. Real LLM via ANTHROPIC_API_KEY. Used both as developer reference and as a fixture for the Playwright matrix e2e under e2e/tests/agent-loop/. Not published.
